nasb.text: But you shall seek the Lord at the place which the Lord your God will choose from all your tribes, to establish His name there for His dwelling, and there you shall come.

esv.text: But you shall seek the place that the Lord your God will choose out of all your tribes to put his name and make his habitation there. There you shall go,

cnv.text: 耶和華你們的　神從你們各支派中，選擇了甚麼地方作立他名的居所，你們就當到那裡求問他；

ccb.text: 你们的上帝耶和华要在你们众支派中选一个地方作祂的居所，你们要去那里敬拜祂，
